titleStmt.title: SII 4.1308: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1308. (A.R. No. 393 of 1893). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
lakṣmīpatē¨rvadanapadmabhuvāmadhi ka ḍaritya Āsīdaśēṣaguṇalabdhacatu
¨ryya Iti kāśyapagōtrasiṁhaḥ [. 1*] tasya priyā putrī tatputraratnakhanirāśritakalpavallī mānyā va� pati
dēvatānāṁ patnī pratītavibhavā bhuvi vennamāṁbā [. 2*] tābhyāṁ prābhūdagastyasphuṭamativimalaḥ pītavidyāsamudrassanmā¨rgōpā¨rjjitaśrī
ratiśayarucirārādhanē caṁdramaulēḥ . vaiśāradyaṁ dadhānā nijabhujatarasā pa¨rvvataunnatyarōdhiśrīmakkī¨rttīśvarōyaṁ nikhilaguṇanidhi
¨rbhbhīmanā¨ryyaḥ priyā¨ryyaḥ [. 3*] śākābdānāṁ pramāṇē jagadudadhiviyaccaṁdrage māsi caitrē rāhugrastē śaśāṁkē tribhuvanavibhavē bhīmanā¨ryyaḥ pra
dīpaṁ . dākṣārāmēbhirāmē smadiśati daśadikrīkhyātarāyūrināthaḥ śrīmānbīmēśvarāya kṣapitatamatamaṣṭaṇḍamucchairakhaṇḍaṁ [. 4*]
śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1043 svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpridhvīvallabha māhārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara satyāśrayakulatila
ka(ṁ) cālukyābharaṇa(ṁ) śrīmattrībhuvanamalladēvara prava¨rdhamānamācaṁdra¨rkkatārakaṁ śīmaccālukyavikramasaṁvatsa 45 śrahi gu
ddavadināṁṭi peddaḍākarēmi śrībhīmēsvaramāhādēvaraku rāyūri bhīmanabhaṭlu sōmagrahaṇanimittamunaṁ beṭṭina Akhaṇḍava¨rtti lō
hadaṇḍudiviya 1 . dīniki nacaṁdra¨rkamu neyu sariyiṁccuvārugā śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvara kilaramuna nāvabōla pōlaṇḍunu
ṁ gāṭabōla paṇḍaṇḍunu Eṟiyabōla bādaṇḍunuṁ dalarāsi nāvani berasina bōlu nalvuruṁ buṁṭagāṁ gāṭabōla paṇḍani Aḍapu
na dāmabōla Eṟiyani vasamunaṁ beṭṭina yinupaEḍlu 50 . dīniki nityapaḍi golavaṁgalavāru tribhuvanāṁkkuśamuna
nē māna 1 . likhītaṁ peddanasariya .
Digital edition of SII 4.1308 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
